global.description: The ad features a solid blue background with text and shapes conveying a financial service.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple financial service.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: CoinBridge logo
elements.description: A simple logo at the top featuring the text 'CoinBridge' in a bold, modern font.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The text 'Secure & simple' is prominently displayed in a large, white font, conveying the main message.

elements.label: Supporting message
elements.description: The phrase 'Built for peace of mind' appears below the main message in a smaller, white font.

elements.label: Decorative shape
elements.description: An abstract shape in the center, possibly a rounded rectangle, adds visual interest.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: Another rounded shape overlapping with the first, contributing to the modern design.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle shape positioned near the center, enhancing the abstract design.

elements.label: Large rectangle
elements.description: A large rectangle shape that serves as a background for the text elements.

elements.label: Small rectangle
elements.description: A smaller rectangle shape positioned within the larger rectangle, adding depth.

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Shop now' in a bold, white font.

elements.label: Button shadow
elements.description: A subtle shadow effect around the 'Shop now' button, giving it a three-dimensional appearance.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A decorative element at the bottom, possibly a gradient or additional shape.

elements.description: The text 'Secure simple Built for peace of mind' is displayed prominently in a large, white font.
